calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2017 Set For Trial On Dec-18-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jun-22-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2017 Continued To Jun-21-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. STEVEN MIYAKE APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. GERARD J. DONNELLAN, TEL. NO. 1-415-268-5352 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Pacific Bell Telephone Company's motion to strike emotional distress damages from the second amended complaint is granted. While it is not free from doubt, this case is governed by the rule prohibiting emotional distress damages for a negligent breach of contract set forth in Erlich v. Menezes (1999) 21 Cal. 4th 543 rather than the rules permitting emotional distress damages for nuisance where the parties do not have a contractual relationship or for conversion based on breach of a duty independent of the contract where they do have a contractual relationship set forth in Hensley v. San Diego Gas & Electric Company (2017) 7 Cal. App. 5th 1337 and Gonzales v. Personal Storage, Inc. (1997) 56 Cal. App. 4th 464. This may be an appropriate issue to seek appellate review by writ. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2017 Continued To May-17-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Pacific Bell Telephone Company'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE COMPANY'S Motion To Strike is granted with leave to amend. Plaintiff has 10 days leave to amend to plead a nuisance cause of action that can support a claim for emotional distress damages. Order signed. Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2016 Continued To Mar-15-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
